versions.content: A card with an asterisk (*) before its title is unique. There can be only one unique card with the same title in play at a time. If the title and subtitle (Alter-Ego) match a card already in play, the new card cannot enter play.

whats_new.diff: Revision of uniqueness rules. The comparison is now strictly made between the main title (e.g., Captain America) AND the Alter-Ego identity (Steve Rogers), to definitively prevent thematic inconsistencies in multiplayer.
